blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 54°F.
